reference: Dear, as you have noticed the infection after two months, it may be due to contact dermatitis. Avoid using the same material to wear next time. In case you suspect a keloid, it is better not to touch it again. A dermatologist may handle it better. In the first scenario, you can apply an antibiotic and anti-inflammatory steroid cream on the affected area, such as Cortisporin cream.
text: Dear, as you have noticed the infection after two months, it may be due to contact dermatitis. Avoid using the same material to wear next time. In case you suspect a keloid, it is better not to touch it again. A dermatologist may handle it better. In the first scenario, you can apply an antibiotic and anti-inflammatory steroid cream on the affected area, such as Eryng cream.
